general.name: mos_target_sdss_id_stacked_parquet
general.description:
This table includes associations between sdss_id identifiers and the matched catalogids for each catalogue cross-match.

The table contains one row per sdss_id with columns for each catalogid version. However, catalogids may be associated with multiple sdss_id. dr20_sdss_id_flat is a pivoted/flattened version of this table and contains information about the preferred sdss_id for a catalogid.

Note: The sdss_id match was extended internally for a more recent crossmatch not yet part of the publicly released data. As such, the ra/dec_sdss_id columns may differ from the catalogid coordinates.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_sdss_id_stacked.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

catalogid21.name: catalogid21
catalogid21.description: The catalogid for the best matched object in the v0.1 cross-match (pk=21).

catalogid25.name: catalogid25
catalogid25.description: The catalogid for the best matched object in the v0.5 cross-match (pk=25).

catalogid31.name: catalogid31
catalogid31.description: The catalogid for the best matched object in the v1 cross-match (pk=31).

ra_sdss_id.name: ra_sdss_id
ra_sdss_id.description: The right ascension of the target in ICRS J2015.5 coordinates (taken from the highest version catalogid).

dec_sdss_id.name: dec_sdss_id
dec_sdss_id.description: The declination of the target in ICRS J2015.5 coordinates (taken from the highest version catalogid).

sdss_id.name: sdss_id
sdss_id.description: The SDSS identifier for a unique object.
